Tasks

Capture school work naturally, then review it here.

Add a Task

Type naturally — "Bio test Friday" or "English essay due tomorrow at 11pm".

Examples: "Bio test next Friday." "Math worksheet due tomorrow." "Remind me to study chemistry tonight."
